rationale: tests/contract.rs now imports heimq::protocol::SUPPORTED_APIS and asserts the full advertised set equals SUPPORTED_APIS (sorted), eliminating both the hardcoded drift and the fail-fast masking. Matches AC: derives from SUPPORTED_APIS and asserts the full computed set.

findings.summary: Equality between SUPPORTED_APIS and the memory-backend computed set is independently guaranteed by the unit test at src/protocol/mod.rs:159-160, so asserting directly against SUPPORTED_APIS is safe.
